sources.name: Intangible Assets
sources.rationale: large revenue base (743B) enables sustained IP investment

sources.name: Network Effect
sources.rationale: high EPS growth 75% (operating leverage from scale)

sources.name: Cost Advantage
sources.rationale: gross margins slightly above industry average; massive scale ($743B revenue) enables fixed-cost absorption

sources.name: Efficient Scale
sources.rationale: majority revenue from one segment (50.0%); $100B+ revenue scale creates massive entry barrier

analysis: Intangible Assets and Network Effect and Cost Advantage create a durable competitive fortress. The company's moat is reinforced by multiple reinforcing factors, making it unlikely competitors can erode its position in the next decade.
